title: Polls and Voting
description: A simple utility datapack that adds a way to make polls in multiplayer
body:
# Polls and Voting
This datapack lets you make simple polls in multiplayer.

## How to use
Run `/trigger voting` to start a poll. 

You will be given a book. On the first page of that book, you write the **poll title**. On the following pages (up to 5 pages), you write the poll options (for example “yes”, “no”, “maybe”). 

Then you can drop the book (hold and press Q), and the poll will start. 

### Voting on the poll
To vote in a poll, just press [Vote] on the option you would like to vote for. You can change your vote, but only ever vote for one option.
